data.title: ZenaDrone 1000 aims to boost U.S. defense deals through green UAS initiative by ZenaTech.
data.description: ZenaTech's subsidiary, ZenaDrone, has started the process of applying for the Green UAS program for their ZenaDrone 1000 model. This initiative aims to enhance the company's chances in securing defense and government contracts in the United States. The Green UAS program focuses on environmentally-friendly unmanned aerial systems. This move by ZenaDrone signifies a strategic push into the defense sector, which holds lucrative procurement opportunities. The ZenaDrone 1000 is poised to play a key role in this market, with its advanced features and capabilities designed to meet the stringent requirements of defense and government agencies. This application represents a significant step for ZenaTech, highlighting their commitment to expanding their presence in this critical sector.

data.title: FuelCell Energy releases 2025 Annual and Sustainability Reports detailing financial performance and sustainability efforts.
data.description: Today in Danbury, Connecticut, FuelCell Energy, Inc. (Nasdaq: FCEL) shared its 2025 Annual Report and 2025 Sustainability Report showcasing its financial and operational performance for the fiscal year. The reports highlight the company's commitment to distributed generation, disciplined growth, manufacturing scale, and profitability. They also emphasize FuelCell Energy's dedication to advancing sustainability through innovative and clean energy technologies.

data.title: One Bullion Ltd. to attend PDAC 2026 in Toronto, showcasing 3 mining areas in Botswana.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 19, 2026, One Bullion Ltd. (TSXV: OBUL), a gold exploration company, shared its plans to showcase at PDAC 2026 in Toronto, Canada. The event, recognized as the leading mineral exploration and mining convention globally, will be held from March 1-4, 2026. One Bullion, owning three promising mining areas in Botswana, will have a booth to engage with attendees and share insights. This move reflects the company's commitment to expanding its presence and exploring opportunities in the industry.

data.title: WestKam Gold Corp. settles $260,000 debt, issuing 2,476,189 shares at $0.105/share to resolve creditors. Directors/officers also get 2,333,332 shares in exchange for $245,000 debt.
data.description: WestKam Gold Corp. (TSXV:WKG) in Vancouver announces debt settlements totaling $260,000 with creditors, subject to TSX Venture Exchange approval. They plan to issue 2,476,189 common shares at $0.105 per share. Directors and officers will receive 2,333,332 shares for settling $245,000 debt, constituting a related party transaction under MI 61-101. Exemptions are expected for formal valuation and minority shareholder approval due to the Company's market status and share value compared to market capitalization. Hold period for issued shares is four months and one day.

data.title: Traws Pharma finds ratutrelvir safer than PAXLOVID; suitable for PAXLOVID-ineligible patients; may prevent flu; positive outcomes.
data.description: The latest clinical trial data on ratutrelvir show it offers a distinct advantage compared to PAXLOVID®. The study demonstrated fewer side effects and no instances of the virus resurging, while also proving to be equally effective in resolving symptoms over the same duration. This was consistent across patients who were deemed ineligible for PAXLOVID®, indicating a viable treatment option for a considerable portion of the population previously lacking effective remedies.

data.title: Trex Select® Decking and Signature® X-Series™ Railing receive top design awards for performance.
data.description: The exceptional performance and versatility of Select® Decking and Signature® X-Series™ Railing have been acknowledged by industry experts. These products have received recognition for their outstanding features and functionality, making them stand out in the market. Their innovative design and durability have made them a popular choice among consumers, with Select® Decking boasting a 95% satisfaction rate and Signature® X-Series™ Railing achieving a 90% customer approval rating. These accolades highlight the superior quality and craftsmanship of these products, solidifying their position as top contenders in the decking and railing industry.

data.title: SAGA Metals updates on MRE drilling program at Trapper South with 10 drill holes (2,039m) confirming oxide mineralization.
data.description: As of 2026, a total of ten diamond drill holes have been completed, reaching a combined length of 2,039 meters. In each of these logged holes, oxide mineralization has been confirmed.

data.title: Signet Jewelers (NYSE: SIG) to announce Q4 results on March 19, 2026, 7:00 am ET, with a conference call at 8:00 am ET. Call details: (+1) 800 549 8228 / (+1) 646 564 2877.
data.description: Signet Jewelers Limited (NYSE: SIG) is set to reveal its fourth-quarter results on Thursday, March 19, 2026, at around 7:00 a.m. ET. A conference call will follow at 8:00 a.m. ET, with a simultaneous audio webcast accessible at www.signetjewelers.com. For those interested in joining the call, the toll-free number for North America is (+1) 800 549 8228, and for International or those in New York, the number is (+1) 646 564 2877. The conference ID is 21035. Participants can register for the call in advance.

data.title: Jeffs' Brands' KeepZone AI partners with Assac Networks to distribute cybersecurity software globally. Characters: 107
data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel - On February 19, 2026, Jeffs' Brands Ltd ("Jeffs’ Brands" or "the Company") disclosed that its subsidiary, KeepZone AI Inc. ("KeepZone"), has signed a distribution agreement (the "Agreement") with Assac Networks Ltd. ("Assac"), a prominent Israeli company specializing in secure communication and cybersecurity solutions. Jeffs' Brands, a data-focused e-commerce entity on the Amazon Marketplace, is broadening its horizons into the global homeland security sector utilizing advanced artificial intelligence ("AI") technologies. Listed on Nasdaq as JFBR and JFBRW, the Company continues its expansion with this strategic partnership.

data.title: Upbound Group (NASDAQ: UPBD) beat estimated earnings by 4.12%, reporting EPS of $1.01 versus $0.97. Revenue increased by $117.00 million.
data.description: Upbound Group (NASDAQ: UPBD) announced its Q4 earnings on Thursday, February 19, 2026 at 07:00 AM. Key details from the earnings report reveal that Upbound Group surpassed estimated earnings by 4.12%, posting an EPS of $1.01 compared to the expected $0.97. Furthermore, the revenue saw an impressive increase of $117.00 million from the same quarter in the previous year. In the prior quarter, the company exceeded EPS projections by $0.02, leading to a subsequent 0.21% rise in the shares. For the comprehensive story, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Architect Frank Gehry disregarded norms to create innovative designs. His father doubted his success. (Total characters: 115)
data.description: The father of Gehry once mentioned that he was a dreamer lacking business acumen and predicted he would not succeed. Gehry revolutionized building design by breaking conventions, as per a report by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Kane Biotech expands in US with distribution deals for revyve Antimicrobial Wound Gel product line with companies in Texas and New Jersey.
data.description: Kane Biotech Inc., based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, made an announcement on Feb. 19, 2026, regarding its latest business endeavors. The company disclosed that it has officially penned non-exclusive distribution and sales contracts for its revyve® Antimicrobial Wound Gel® assortment. This agreement encompasses partnerships with Patient Care Medical from Austin, TX, and Life Biologics headquartered in Lakewood, NJ. This strategic move marks a significant step for Kane Biotech, leveraging the extensive reach of these partners to introduce its innovative medical product to a wider audience. This initiative is expected to propel the exposure and availability of the revyve® Antimicrobial Wound Gel® line, enhancing its market penetration and potentially boosting company revenue.

data.title: Synthetik to support Amentum in UK hypersonics mission with engineering expertise. Providing hypersonic modeling and simulation.
data.description: Synthetik Applied Technologies UK has been chosen to aid Amentum as the Industry Mission Partner (IMP) for TeamHx UK, supporting the MOD in establishing a UK hypersonics capability. This innovative partnership marks an MOD first in the approach to tackle a national technology challenge. Synthetik will contribute expertise in hypersonic modeling and simulation, digital integration, and knowledge-hub support to enhance MOD's delivery.

data.title: Trump claims 78% drop in US trade deficit due to tariffs, hopes for surplus soon. Official trade data to be released on Feb 19.
data.description: President Donald Trump asserted that his administration's strong tariff measures have led to a significant 78% drop in the U.S. trade deficit, with plans for the country to potentially reach its first trade surplus in years. In a message posted on Truth Social, Trump highlighted the effectiveness of his global "reciprocal tariffs" enforced on more than 100 countries since April 2025. He credited the decrease directly to these tariffs, emphasizing that the U.S. trade deficit has shrunk by 78% due to the charged duties. Trump optimistically mentioned the likelihood of the trade balance turning positive sometime this year, representing a substantial shift in trade policy. The President's speech anticipates the official release of December trade data on Feb. 19. Supporters see this potential transformation as a form of validation for the administration's trade strategies.
